name: h0-archon
description: Archon-on-Vercel+AWS — agentic finance intelligence for SMBs. Fuses bank movement, sales goals, purchases, and payroll controls into an auditable monthly close.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/pipeline.test.ts tests/store.test.ts tests/db.test.ts tests/insights.test.ts tests/extraction.test.ts eval/tests/metrics.test.ts
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run pipeline
scripts.eval:gen: python eval/generate_corpus.py --n 6 --out eval/corpus/sample --seed 1 --kind sample && python eval/generate_corpus.py --n 40 --out eval/corpus/full --seed 7 --kind full
